name: Anse Chastanet Reef
description: Volcanic reef on the southwest coast of St. Lucia, within the Soufriere Marine Management Area. Known for dramatic walls, healthy coral cover, and rich fish life. Popular dive sites include Anse Chastanet Reef, Fairyland, and Superman's Flight.

seasonalNotes.jan-apr: Dry season. Best visibility (30m+). Whale watching season. Cooler water temps 25-27°C.
seasonalNotes.may-jun: Transition. Some rain. Water warming to 27-28°C. Fewer crowds.
seasonalNotes.jul-oct: Hurricane season. Warmer water 28-30°C. Reduced visibility after storms. Green season rates.
seasonalNotes.nov-dec: Transition back to dry. Good diving. Water cooling 26-28°C.

diveSites.name: Anse Chastanet Reef
diveSites.description: Gentle slope with excellent coral cover. Great for beginners and photography. Dense fish life in the shallows.

diveSites.name: Fairyland
diveSites.description: Dramatic spur and groove formations. Large sea fans and barrel sponges. Frequent turtle sightings.

diveSites.name: Superman's Flight
diveSites.description: Wall dive with strong currents. Named for the sensation of flying along the wall. Pelagic encounters possible.
